summary: VFans Media P3 Complete - All 4 new backend endpoints tested and verified. Frontend Dashboard, Analytics, Customers, and Transactions pages successfully fetch real data from backend. Empty states display correctly. Stripe checkout with empty description fix verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new endpoints properly authenticated with get_current_user dependency
Stats endpoint correctly aggregates data from links, purchases, and transactions collections
Analytics endpoint handles empty arrays gracefully for top_links and top_customers
Customers endpoint properly aggregates purchase data per customer with last_purchase timestamp
Transactions endpoint correctly joins purchases with links and customers for display data
Frontend pages use proper data-testid attributes for testability
Empty state messages are user-friendly and provide clear next actions

test_credentials.note: Demo user is reset when calling /api/demo/initialize - creates fresh org/creator

seed_data_creation: Each test session creates fresh org and creator via onboarding flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 endpoints are fully working. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_creator_endpoints_p3.py covers all 4 new endpoints (stats, analytics, customers, transactions) plus Stripe checkout with empty description. Demo user resets on each login creating new org/creator. To test with real purchase data, would need to complete a Stripe payment flow.

backend_endpoints_tested: GET /api/creators/{creator_id}/stats - Returns total_views, total_purchases, total_earned, total_customers, total_links, active_links
GET /api/creators/{creator_id}/analytics - Returns views, customers, sales counts + top_links and top_customers arrays
GET /api/creators/{creator_id}/customers - Returns list of customers with purchases, total_spent, last_purchase
GET /api/creators/{creator_id}/transactions - Returns list with link_title, customer_email, amount, status, created_at
POST /api/links/{link_id}/checkout - Verified works with null/empty description (Stripe fix)
frontend_pages_tested: /creator/{id}/dashboard - Total Earnings card + Views/Sales/Customers/Links stat cards (data from /stats endpoint)
/creator/{id}/analytics - Views/Customers/Sales stats + chart placeholder + Top Links + Top Customers (data from /analytics)
/creator/{id}/customers - Search bar + customers table (data from /customers endpoint)
/creator/{id}/transactions - Search bar + status filter + transactions table + 7-day pending info (data from /transactions)
ui_elements_verified: Dashboard: Total Earnings $0.00, Views 0, Sales 0, Customers 0, Links 0 (0 active)
Analytics: Stats card with Views/Customers/Sales, 'No data available yet' message, Top Links 'Nothing here yet', Top Customers 'Nothing here yet'
Customers: 'No customers yet' empty state with descriptive message
Transactions: 'No transactions yet' empty state, 'Create link' CTA button, 7-day pending funds info banner

stats_endpoint.details: Returns correct structure with all 6 fields, handles empty data

analytics_endpoint.details: Returns summary stats + top_links (sorted by views) + top_customers (sorted by total_spent)

customers_endpoint.details: Returns aggregated customer data with purchase count, total_spent, last_purchase timestamp

transactions_endpoint.details: Returns purchase data with link title and customer email/name lookups

stripe_empty_description.details: Checkout session creation works with null/empty description field

frontend_data_binding.details: All 4 pages correctly fetch and display data from their respective endpoints

empty_states.details: All pages show appropriate empty state messages when no data exists
